query:
SELECT u.id, u.name, u.email, u.crmAccess, acp.orbitEnabled, acp.uniqueAgentId, acp.portalStatus
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN agent_crm_profiles acp ON acp.userId = u.id
WHERE u.name LIKE '%Harri%' OR u.email LIKE '%harri%' OR u.name LIKE '%Cowan%'
LIMIT 5;
